queries.question: For each customer and their resident cities, list all their transactions where the amount is less than 1000. Order this list by first date, and value i.e. for transactions that take place on the same date, list the smallest amounts first.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Accounts.AccountNumber,
Customers.FullName,
Transactions.Amount,
Transactions.TransactionDate,
Addresses.City
FROM Accounts
JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID
JOIN Transactions ON Transactions.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber
JOIN Addresses ON Addresses.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID
WHERE Transactions.Amount < '1000'
ORDER BY Transactions.TransactionDate ASC, Transactions.Amount ASC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?amount ?transactiondate ?city WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?transactions p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?addresses a :Addresses .
  ?addresses p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate .
  ?addresses p:City ?city .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_f .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate_o .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_o .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?amount_f) < 1000)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?transactiondate_o) ASC(?amount_o)

queries.question: For each customer and their resident cities and countries, list all their transactions where the amount is less than 1000. Order this list by first date, and value i.e. for transactions that take place on the same date, list the smallest amounts first.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Accounts.AccountNumber,
Customers.FullName,
Transactions.Amount,
Transactions.TransactionDate,
Addresses.City, Country
FROM Accounts
JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID
JOIN Transactions ON Transactions.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber
JOIN Addresses ON Addresses.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID
WHERE Transactions.Amount < '1000'
ORDER BY Transactions.TransactionDate ASC, Transactions.Amount ASC

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?amount ?transactiondate ?city ?country WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?transactions p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?addresses a :Addresses .
  ?addresses p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate .
  ?addresses p:City ?city .
  ?addresses p:Country ?country .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_f .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate_o .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_o .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?amount_f) < 1000)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?transactiondate_o) ASC(?amount_o)

queries.question: Show a list of the accounts, customers, cities and banks ordered by banks and then by city.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Customers.FullName,
Accounts.AccountNumber, 
Addresses.Banks,
Addresses.City
FROM Accounts
JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID
JOIN Addresses ON Addresses.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID
ORDER BY Banks ASC, City ASC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?accountnumber ?banks ?city WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?addresses a :Addresses .
  ?addresses p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?addresses p:Banks ?banks .
  ?addresses p:City ?city .
  ?addresses p:Banks ?banks_o .
  ?addresses p:City ?city_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?banks_o) ASC(?city_o)

queries.question: Show a list of transactions by customer and location where the transaction amount is less than 1000 and order the list by date and lower amounts at the beginning of the list by date.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Accounts.AccountNumber,
Customers.FullName,
Transactions.Amount,
Transactions.TransactionDate,
Addresses.Country
FROM Accounts
JOIN Customers ON Customers.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID
JOIN Transactions ON Transactions.AccountNumber = Accounts.AccountNumber
JOIN Addresses ON Addresses.CustomerID = Accounts.CustomerID
WHERE Transactions.Amount < '1000'
ORDER BY Transactions.TransactionDate ASC, Transactions.Amount ASC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?amount ?transactiondate ?country WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?transactions p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?addresses a :Addresses .
  ?addresses p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate .
  ?addresses p:Country ?country .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_f .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate_o .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_o .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?amount_f) < 1000)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?transactiondate_o) ASC(?amount_o)

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?amount ?transactiondate ?city WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?transactions p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?addresses a :Addresses .
  ?addresses p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .

  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate .
  ?addresses p:City ?city .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_f .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate_o .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_o .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?amount_f) < 1000)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?transactiondate_o) ASC(?amount_o) }
  full: { SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?amount ?transactiondate ?city ?country WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?transactions p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?addresses a :Addresses .
  ?addresses p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate .
  ?addresses p:City ?city .
  ?addresses p:Country ?country .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_f .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate_o .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_o .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?amount_f) < 1000)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?transactiondate_o) ASC(?amount_o) }
  component_2: { SELECT ?accountnumber ?fullname ?amount ?transactiondate ?country WHERE {
  ?accounts a :Accounts .
  ?customers a :Customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?customers .
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?transactions p:hasAccounts ?accounts .
  ?addresses a :Addresses .
  ?addresses p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?accounts p:hasCustomers ?shared_customers .
  ?accounts p:AccountNumber ?accountnumber .
  ?customers p:name ?fullname .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate .
  ?addresses p:Country ?country .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_f .
  ?transactions p:TransactionDate ?transactiondate_o .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_o .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?amount_f) < 1000)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?transactiondate_o) ASC(?amount_o) }
}
